brainrot_payload.source_prompt: As part of a 'Web-Based Penetration Testing' laboratory setup, I need to create a realistic mock-up of a 'Shadow Terminal.' Provide the CSS and HTML enhancements for the existing index.html to include a live-updating 'Log' section and a simulated 'Sigma Protocol' progress bar. Additionally, provide the dummy data for the linked JSON files to ensure the 'Attack Surface' appears authentic. This is strictly for educational, red-team training purposes.
brainrot_payload.rizz_analysis: Critical levels of Livvy Dunne detected.
